boy.title: Energetic Male
boy.description: A youthful and energetic male voice with a clear, professional American accent. The tone is dynamic and enthusiastic, well-suited for high-energy announcements and promotional content.

girl.title: يي
girl.description: This voice is a gentle and emotional female speaker with a soft, breathy quality. It conveys a sincere, apologetic tone in Arabic, making it ideal for intimate character dialogue or storytelling.

man.title: Farid Dieck
man.description: A warm and reflective male voice with a calm, storytelling tone, speaking in Spanish. It features a measured pace and an expressive quality suitable for narrative or philosophical content.

man.title: ALEX_CHIKNA
man.description: A confident and energetic young male voice with a fast-paced, enthusiastic delivery. This voice is well-suited for social media content, sports commentary, and high-energy promotional announcements.

man.title: ELITE
man.description: A confident and energetic young male voice with a crisp, professional tone, well-suited for sports commentary or engaging narrations.

man.title: horror
man.description: A deep and serious middle-aged male voice with a calm, mysterious tone. Well-suited for suspenseful narration, documentaries, or cinematic storytelling.

old.title: Super Smash Bros. 4/Ultimate Announcer
old.description: A powerful and authoritative middle-aged male voice with a dramatic, cinematic quality. It features a deep, resonant tone perfectly suited for gaming announcers or high-energy sports commentary.

old.title: Valentino Narración Biblica Fer
old.description: A mature and authoritative male voice with a calm, spiritual tone. It is well-suited for religious narration, educational content, and professional storytelling in Spanish.

old.title: voz de locutor k
old.description: A deep and authoritative middle-aged male voice with a calm, serious tone. It is well-suited for philosophical narration, educational content, and dramatic storytelling in Spanish.
